label: Site part
description: Defines one component of a world site. Multiple site parts can be stacked to compose a site's threat level, worker behavior, incoming letter, and loot.

conditionCauserDef.label: Condition causer def
conditionCauserDef.description: ThingDef for the game condition causer spawned on the map when this site part is active.

activeThreatDisturbanceFactor.label: Active threat disturbance factor
activeThreatDisturbanceFactor.description: Multiplier applied to disturbance events while the site part's threat is active. Default 1.

defaultHidden.label: Default hidden
defaultHidden.description: If true, this site part is hidden from the player by default and does not show in the site description.

workerClass.label: Worker class
workerClass.description: C# SitePartWorker subclass that implements this part's runtime behavior. Defaults to SitePartWorker.

siteTexture.label: Site texture
siteTexture.description: Texture path used as the primary icon for the world site when this part is the main part.

expandingIconTexture.label: Expanding icon texture
expandingIconTexture.description: Texture path shown in the expanding world view icon for this site part.

forceMutators.label: Force mutators
forceMutators.description: TileMutatorDefs that are always applied to the world tile when this site part generates a map.

applyFactionColorToSiteTexture.label: Apply faction color to site texture
applyFactionColorToSiteTexture.description: If true, the site texture is tinted to the owning faction's color.

showFactionInInspectString.label: Show faction in inspect string
showFactionInInspectString.description: If true, the owning faction is shown in the site inspect pane.

requiresFaction.label: Requires faction
requiresFaction.description: If true, this site part can only be generated for sites that have an owning faction.

disallowsAutomaticDetectionTimerStart.label: Disallows automatic detection timer start
disallowsAutomaticDetectionTimerStart.description: If true, the automatic detection countdown does not start when the player first sees this site.

minFactionTechLevel.label: Min faction tech level
minFactionTechLevel.description: Minimum TechLevel required for the owning faction for this site part to be eligible.

approachOrderString.label: Approach order string
approachOrderString.description: Translated string shown as the action label for approaching or raiding this site.

approachingReportString.label: Approaching report string
approachingReportString.description: Translated string shown in the caravan report while the player's caravan is travelling to this site.

tags.label: Tags
tags.description: Free-form string tags for this site part. Used by CompatibleWith checks and quest generation filters.

excludesTags.label: Excludes tags
excludesTags.description: Tags of site parts that cannot coexist on the same site as this part.

arrivedLetter.label: Arrived letter
arrivedLetter.description: Translated letter body text sent to the player when the caravan arrives at this site.

arrivedLetterLabelPart.label: Arrived letter label part
arrivedLetterLabelPart.description: Translated string appended to the letter title when the caravan arrives at this site.

arrivedLetterHediffHyperlinks.label: Arrived letter hediff hyperlinks
arrivedLetterHediffHyperlinks.description: HediffDefs shown as hyperlinks in the arrival letter for this site part.

arrivedLetterDef.label: Arrived letter def
arrivedLetterDef.description: LetterDef that determines the color, icon, and pause behavior of the arrival letter.

wantsThreatPoints.label: Wants threat points
wantsThreatPoints.description: If true, threat points from the storyteller are passed to this site part to scale enemy strength.

minThreatPoints.label: Min threat points
minThreatPoints.description: Minimum threat point value used when wantsThreatPoints is true.

increasesPopulation.label: Increases population
increasesPopulation.description: If true, entering this site and completing it counts toward colony population growth for the storyteller.

badEvenIfNoMap.label: Bad even if no map
badEvenIfNoMap.description: If true, this site part is considered a negative presence even if no map was generated for it.

forceExitAndRemoveMapCountdownDurationDa.label: Force exit and remove map countdown duration days
forceExitAndRemoveMapCountdownDurationDa.description: Number of in-game days before the game forces the player's caravan to exit and removes the map.

handlesWorldObjectTimeoutInspectString.label: Handles world object timeout inspect string
handlesWorldObjectTimeoutInspectString.description: If true, this site part is responsible for displaying the timeout countdown in the inspect pane instead of the default handler.

mainPartAllThreatsLabel.label: Main part all threats label
mainPartAllThreatsLabel.description: Label string used when listing all active threats on a site in the UI. Can be empty to suppress the label.

minMapSize.label: Min map size
minMapSize.description: Minimum map size (x, y, z) required when this site part generates a map. Written as '(200, 0, 200)'.

selectionWeight.label: Selection weight
selectionWeight.description: Relative weight for random selection of this site part by the quest or site generation system.

considerEnteringAsAttack.label: Consider entering as attack
considerEnteringAsAttack.description: If true, the player's caravan entering this site counts as an attack and triggers appropriate faction reactions.

gravShipsCanLandOn.label: Grav ships can land on
gravShipsCanLandOn.description: If true, gravity ships are allowed to land at this site.

copyQuestName.label: Copy quest name
copyQuestName.description: If true, this site part copies the quest name as its own label in the world view.

leaveAbandonedSettlement.label: Leave abandoned settlement
leaveAbandonedSettlement.description: If true, an abandoned settlement world object is left on the tile after the site is cleared.

displayOnInspectPane.label: Display on inspect pane
displayOnInspectPane.description: If true, this site part is listed in the site's inspect pane.

lootTable.label: Loot table
lootTable.description: List of things that can be looted from this site part, each with a selection weight.

basic-site-part.label: Basic site part
basic-site-part.description: Minimal site part with a label and default behavior.

threat-site-part.label: Threat site part
threat-site-part.description: Site part that uses threat points to scale enemy strength.
